overview: The novel follows Bjorn, a barbarian trapped in a mysterious labyrinth world, as he struggles to survive and grow stronger. After a brutal start, he forms temporary alliances, faces betrayal, and accumulates power and wealth. Through a series of labyrinth expeditions, political intrigues, and personal growth, he evolves from a struggling explorer into a formidable force, navigating alliances and enemies in the city of Rafdonia.

arcs.title: Partnership in the Labyrinth
arcs.description: Bjorn navigates the first labyrinth floors with explorer Hans, who betrays him. Bjorn kills Hans and later meets the wounded fairy Erwen. They form a temporary night companion partnership, fleeing from the Crystal Alliance. They fight goblins and are ambushed by four explorers, but manage to kill them and escape to Rafdonia. This arc establishes Bjorn's survival instincts and his uneasy alliance with Erwen.
key_events: Bjorn kills Hans in self-defense
Bjorn meets and heals the injured fairy Erwen
They become night companions and flee from Crystal Alliance
Ambushed by four explorers; Bjorn kills Illis, Erwen kills Persi
They escape through the portal to Rafdonia

arcs.title: Return and Preparation
arcs.description: Back in Rafdonia, Bjorn exchanges magic stones for wealth, reunites with Erwen, and meets her sister Tersia. He forms a party with the barbarian Ainar and prepares for the next labyrinth entry. He acquires the Immortal Engraving, buys equipment, and establishes a routine of training and study. The arc ends with Bjorn and Ainar entering the labyrinth using a dimensional instability technique.
key_events: Bjorn exchanges stones and gains wealth
Bjorn meets Erwen's sister Tersia and receives payment
Bjorn forms a party with Ainar, agreeing to an 8:2 split
Bjorn gets the Immortal Engraving from the Tribe Chief
Bjorn and Ainar enter the labyrinth using dimensional instability

arcs.title: Land of the Dead
arcs.description: Bjorn and Ainar explore the Land of the Dead, fighting Death Fiends and other monsters. They encounter a red-haired raider who kills four explorers and later chases them. Betrayed by a group of explorers who try to kill them, Bjorn survives thanks to his Immortal Engraving. They are cornered by the Eighth Floor Raider, who forces them to swear a Warrior's Oath to keep silent. Bjorn vows to get stronger.
key_events: Bjorn and Ainar fight Death Fiends and other monsters
They encounter the red-haired raider who kills explorers
Betrayed by explorers, Bjorn is stabbed but survives
Bjorn kills Darvan, Ainar kills two others
They are forced to swear a Warrior's Oath by the Eighth Floor Raider

arcs.title: Bloodstained Fortress Rift
arcs.description: Bjorn and Ainar enter the Bloodstained Fortress Rift with a party including dwarf Hikurod Murad, mage Arua Raven, and porter Tarjin. After clearing monsters, they face a Corpse Golem mid-boss. Later, they encounter the Vampire Duke Cambormir, an Advanced Mutant. Bjorn absorbs the Corpse Golem essence and after a fierce battle, kills the vampire, acquiring its powerful essence and gaining regeneration.
key_events: Party enters the Bloodstained Fortress Rift
They defeat the Corpse Golem mid-boss
Bjorn absorbs the Corpse Golem essence
They fight the Vampire Duke Cambormir
Bjorn kills the vampire and acquires the Vampire Guardian Essence

arcs.title: The Trial
arcs.description: After exiting the rift, Bjorn is detained by guards due to his large stone sum. Investigator Coldo Bierman interrogates him and sentences him to death. Bjorn escapes using Flesh Explosion, takes hostages, and demands a fair trial. With Raven's help, he proves his innocence, receives compensation, and is promoted. He negotiates with Raven's master for the Frost Spirit Ring as compensation for being forcibly fed the Corpse Golem essence.
key_events: Bjorn is arrested and sentenced to death
Bjorn escapes and takes hostages including Julian Urbans
Bjorn's trial ends with his innocence proven and compensation
Bjorn negotiates with Raven's master Deian for the Frost Spirit Ring
Bjorn accepts the Frost Spirit Ring as compensation

arcs.title: New Companions
arcs.description: Bjorn adjusts to life after the trial, parts ways with Ainar as she trains in the Holy Land. He seeks new companions and encounters Hikurod Murad again, forming a team. They recruit mage Riol Worb Dwalki, beastkin Misha Karlstein, and scout Brown Rotmiller. The arc ends as the new team enters the Crystal Cave and Beast Den, with Bjorn reflecting on team dynamics.
key_events: Bjorn parts with Ainar as she leaves for the Holy Land
Bjorn meets Hikurod Murad and they agree to form a team
They recruit new members: Riol, Misha, and Brown
The team enters the Crystal Cave and Beast Den
Bjorn reflects on the Dimensional Instability Phenomenon and team dynamics
